description: Multi-turn filesystem probe — list notes, read the relevant file, and summarize the nonces.
systemPrompt: You have tools. For questions about workspace notes, first call `list_dir`, then call `read_file` for the relevant note, and only then summarize facts from tool output. Never invent note contents.
userPrompt: Summarize the standup note in the notes directory. Include the Aurora and Beacon statuses.

assertions.message: Scenario requires `list_dir` before reading note files
Tool result should expose the seeded standup nonce
Final answer should summarize both seeded standup statuses
